brands.name: Cutler and Gross
brands.source_note: Imagery and model names from the brand's official site at build time.

frames.description: The geometry of mid-century Modernist architecture informed this square sunglass. It is handcrafted with a straight brow bar that juts down at the nose bridge. Angular lugs are mirrored by a slanted lens edge, while sharp temples complete the design.

A Cutler and Gross signature, the 1386 square optical presents an amplified take on American acetate shapes from the 50s. The chunky 9mm frame is gilded with vintage pins and lightened with interior and exterior milling.

The 1402 optical is unapologetically bold, sculpted from 10mm-thick acetate to a square silhouette that nods to our 1980s archive. Oyster and Compass Star pins add polish to the design, which is constructed with striped Hazard core wire and Minimal temple tips.
The 1394 draws inspiration from Cutler and Gross frames created in the 70s. The bold aviator is handcrafted from polished acetate and finished with Compass Star pins.
The 1394 draws inspiration from Cutler and Gross frames created in the 70s. The bold aviator is handcrafted from polished acetate and finished with Compass Star pins.

The 0847 formed the foundations of the first Kingsman collection, created in collaboration with director Matthew Vaughn and the costume design team. It is sculpted with a distinctive browline and paddle temples. As seen on Colin Firth, Michael Caine, and Taron Egerton in 'Kingsman: The Secret Service'.

The geometry of mid-century Modernist architecture informed this square optical. It is handcrafted with a straight brow bar that juts down at the nose bridge. Angular lugs are mirrored by a slanted lens edge, while this season's Desert temples complete the design.
The 9325 optical is handcrafted from 10mm-thick acetate to a chubby rectangular silhouette. It is milled on the interior to lighten the weight and threaded with Hazard core wire.

Referencing the classic 0894 worn by musician Jarvis Cocker of the band Pulp throughout the late 1980s and into the 1990s, the 9894 is a salute to the ingenuity of Cutler and Gross in the 1980s. Details include a retro reverse nose bump, side-mounted hinges and our signature fender temples. This particular placement of the hinges means one size can fit a much wider variety of face shapes.

The Oyster pin has been a Cutler and Gross motif since 1969 and the legacy continues with the 1393 optical. The defiant square silhouette features milling and straight temple tips for a sculptural finish.

Cutler and Gross's archetypal 9782 sunglass has been retooled as an optical, complete with a slim double nose bridge. Milling and bevelling add subtle dimension to the design, which culminates in Fender temples.
A Cutler and Gross signature that's defied decades, the 0772 optical is handcrafted with a heavy brow line and tapered temples. The square silhouette is detailed with polished Diamond pins.

Perfectly round, lightweight, and balanced, the GR01 succinctly distils the themes and purposes of the Graham Cutler Capsule. Featuring comfort milled nose-pads and a slightly wider bridge for a frame that sits comfortably all day.

frames.model: The Great Frog Titan Square Opticals
frames.description: This Cutler and Gross X The Great Frog sunglass is handcarved to a faceted profile with chunky block lugs. Created in collaboration with rock'n'roll jeweller The Great Frog, the antagonistic frame is gilded with Dagger pins.

frames.model: The Great Frog Crossbones Square Opticals
frames.description: Our current 9772 frame which served as the base for the Crossbones is currently one of our bestselling models, originating from a style group that was first created in 1985. The 925 Sterling Silver crossbones detailing, taken from The Great Frog's logo, sits on the redesigned temple which is thickened at the hinge for both a bolder silhouette and improved stability. These are a great pair of everyday glasses with attitude in abundance.
A swooping browline defines the eccentric 1390 round optical. It is inlaid with Compass Star pins and rendered in a spectrum of acetates.
Architectural and artisanal, the 1414 is handcrafted to an oversized square with a flat top and pressed nose bump. It is structured with Modernist core wire and lightened with milled edges.

The classic black optical takes a striking turn with the 9261. It is handcrafted from striated monochrome acetate with a curved browline and chamfered temples. Blackened hardware adds further intrigue.

A square optical, the Cutler and Gross way. The 9690 is our creative director's frame of choice, sculpted with chunky temples and stable 7-bar hinges. It nods to angular styles popularised by 90s Hollywood, while striped Hazard core wire adds a contemporary note.

The 9852 is a visual homage to the spies that operated in the shadows of 1970s London. Subtle milling adds discreet detail to the browline, which slopes down to dropped hinges. Compass Star pins gild the frontal and temples. Each piece is handmade in our atelier over 265 hours.

brands.name: Linda Farrow
brands.source_note: Imagery and model names from the brand's official site at build time.

frames.description: The Blakher d-frame is sculpted from Italian ash acetate with a 22k light gold plated pure Japanese titanium framework which runs into sleek tapered temples. The frame is fitted with adjustable titanium nose pads that offer a tailored fit by allowing bespoke positioning for enhanced comfort.

Finely sculpted wine acetate rims are paired with matt champagne Japanese titanium frame work which runs along the inner brown and into sleek tapered temples. This optical d-frame is fitted with adjustable titanium nose pads that offer a tailored fit by allowing bespoke positioning for enhanced comfort.

The Paulson d-frame is crafted from a combination of ash Italian acetate rim and 22k light gold plated pure Japanese titanium temples. At the brow, a bespoke hardware plate adds a refined architectural detail to the frame. This frame is fitted sculpted nose pads for a tailored fit.

The Blakher d-frame is sculpted from Italian wine acetate with a matt champagne Japanese titanium framework which runs into sleek tapered temples. The frame is fitted with adjustable titanium nose pads that offer a tailored fit by allowing bespoke positioning for enhanced comfort.

An elevated D-frame silhouette crafted from Italian black acetate and contrasting 22 karat gold plated pure Japanese titanium temples. This refined optical frame features a strong architectural brow line, sculpted temples, and adjustable nose pads for enhanced comfort.
The Micky d-frame combines black acetate rims and nickel temples with 22k gold plated details crafted from pure Japanese titanium. The frame features sculpted nose pads for a tailored fit.

Finely sculpted black acetate rims are paired with nickel titanium frame work which runs along the inner brown and into sleek tapered temples. This optical d-frame is fitted with adjustable titanium nose pads that offer a tailored fit by allowing bespoke positioning for enhanced comfort.

The Daley oval optical frame features a satin black painted rim encircled by a contrasting 22K yellow gold-plated pure Japanese titanium framework, blending luxury with modern style. This frame is fitted with adjustable nose pads for a comfortable, bespoke fit.

Finely sculpted wine acetate rims are paired with a delicate matt champagne plated titanium frame work which runs along the inner brown and into sleek tapered temples. This optical d-frame is fitted with adjustable titanium nose pads that offer a tailored fit by allowing bespoke positioning for enhanced comfort.

This product is a limited edition of 120. The edition number is printed on the inside of the temple #/120. Featuring a combination frame of matt champagne plated pure Japanese titanium temples and wine acetate rims, this oval is fitted with adjustable titanium nose pads that offer a tailored fit by allowing bespoke positioning for enhanced comfort.
The Stanley d-frame is crafted from Italian acetate rims in wine and 22k light gold plated pure Japanese titanium temples. The frame features sculpted nose pads for a tailored fit.

This product is a limited edition of 100. The edition number is printed on the inside of the temple #/100. The Danilo angular frame features a contrasting matt champagne frame and wine acetate rims. The frame is fitted with adjustable titanium nose pads that offer a tailored fit by allowing bespoke positioning for enhanced comfort.
The Micky d-frame combine truffle acetate rims and 22k white gold plated temples crafted from pure Japanese titanium. The frame features sculpted nose pads for a tailored fit.

The Page oval frame is crafted from 22k white gold plated pure Japanese titanium and Italian acetate rims in truffle. The frame is fitted with adjustable titanium nose pads that offer a tailored fit by allowing bespoke positioning for enhanced comfort.
The Heath oval frame features truffle rims crafted from Italian acetate and contrasting 22k plated pure Japanese titanium temples. The frame features sculpted nose pads for a tailored fit.

Finely sculpted black acetate rims are paired with a delicate 22 karat yellow gold plated titanium frame work which runs along the inner brown and into sleek tapered temples. This optical d-frame is fitted with adjustable titanium nose pads that offer a tailored fit by allowing bespoke positioning for enhanced comfort.
The Stanley d-frame is crafted from Italian acetate rims in black and nickel pure Japanese titanium temples. The frame features sculpted nose pads for a tailored fit.

Sculpted from matt champagne pure Japanese titanium and featuring brown rim, the Dahlia in Black is a refined oval optical frame that balances delicate engineering with timeless elegance. Adjustable nose pads ensure all-day comfort, while the lightweight construction offers an effortlessly refined silhouette.

The Daley oval optical frame features a satin mocha painted rim encircled by a contrasting 22K yellow gold-plated pure Japanese titanium framework, blending luxury with modern style. This frame is fitted with adjustable nose pads for a comfortable, bespoke fit.

This product is a limited edition of 60. The edition number is printed on the inside of the temple #/60. The Heath oval frame features warm, translucent honey rims crafted from Italian acetate and contrasting matt champagne pure Japanese titanium temples. The frame features sculpted nose pads for a tailored fit.

Aalto Optical is a tall, oversized acetate optical frame, designed for an all day everyday use. The model features sturdy rims and square lenses, with a lowered nose bridge and curved upper line. Its determined frame has been chiseled on the sides for a lightweight yet sturdy fit. This version comes in a light resin colored crystal acetate . Prescription lenses not included. Sizes: R Lens Width: 52 mm Frame Front: Frame Side: 145 mm Product Code Size R: GQZ

The model features thick rims and square lenses, with a lowered nose bridge and curved upper line. Its thick design has been chiseled on the sides for a lightweight yet sturdy fit. This version comes in bright red acetate. Prescription lenses not included. Sizes: R Lens Width: 52 mm Frame Front: 146 mm Frame Side: 145 mm Product Code Size R: 3YS

brands.name: LINDBERG
brands.source_note: Imagery and model names from the brand's official site.

frames.description: Rimless titanium frame with a slim acetate inner rim for depth. Screwless, hingeless and feather-light, fully adjustable to the wearer.
Air Titanium Rim model with a clean profile — titanium rims paired with an acetate inner contour; no screws or welds, hand-assembled and ultralight.
A refined Air Titanium Rim design combining a rimless titanium build with a discreet acetate inner rim. Minimalist, durable and exceptionally light.
From Air Titanium, the original rimless titanium eyewear — built with no screws, rivets or welds, hand-assembled and weighing only a few grams.
Strip Titanium half-rim frame; a fine titanium upper bar gives the lenses an almost floating look for an ultralight, minimalist expression.
Half-rimmed titanium frame from the Strip collection with a distinct upper bar and clean, lightweight silhouette.
Strip Titanium model with a slim upper bar and rimless lower edge — lightweight titanium with LINDBERG's signature adjustability.
Acetate brought together with a titanium core, pairing the warmth and colour of acetate with titanium's strength and a slim, adjustable bridge.
Lightweight acetate with concealed titanium reinforcement for a slimmer, more comfortable acetate frame.
Sculpted acetate with an ingenious titanium bridge core for a light, elegant and fully adjustable fit.
